assumptions.name: fixed_g900_body
assumptions.source_artifact: G900 observatory body and existing transport registries
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may read the fixed G900 body/register state as its static substrate.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not mutate the G900 theorem body, add vertices, add edges, or claim geometry/physics from the body alone.

assumptions.name: admitted_permission_channel_registry
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may treat the current admitted permission channel count and records as fixed ledger inputs.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not admit new permission channels or infer physical permission from simulator behavior.

assumptions.name: admitted_information_transport_registry
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may use the single admitted finite information transport as a graph information-transfer primitive.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not reinterpret finite information transport as physical transport, energy flow, force, or flux.

assumptions.name: f0001_return_hub_seam_plateau
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may use the F0001 seam as visible, identifiable, role/cut handled, and pre-role fingerprinted.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not treat the seam as generated by a constructive source law.

assumptions.name: f0001_generator_gap
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may label any F0001 seam behavior as black-boxed at the generator layer.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not claim the missing pre-role seam generator has been solved by simulation output.

assumptions.name: pre_role_seam_fingerprint_surface
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may expose pre-role seam fingerprints as observables or diagnostic fields.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not promote exact fingerprints to constructive causes.

assumptions.name: simulated_information_flux_observable
assumptions.allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may compute and render information flux, force-like readouts, physical-flux-like readouts, and energy-flow-like readouts as finite graph-information simulation outputs over declared simulator assumptions and admitted information-transport records.
assumptions.forbidden_use: May not reinterpret simulator force-like, physical-flux-like, or energy-flow-like readouts as physical force, physical flux, physical energy flow, field strength, geometry, spacetime, or a new admitted transport.

must_not_claim: simulated force-like readout as physical force
simulated physical-flux-like readout as physical flux
simulated energy-flow-like readout as physical energy flow

true_path_lock.rule: Information may simulate force-like, physical-flux-like, and energy-flow-like readouts. Those readouts remain simulator outputs, not physical claims.
